parameters.query: SELECT id, vehicle_name, contract_number, piid, ceiling, pop_end, status, naics_codes, agency FROM gda_idiq_vehicles WHERE status = 'active' AND monitor_task_orders = true ORDER BY vehicle_name;

parameters.jsCode:

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO gda_opportunity_tracker (title, agency, dept, naics_code, response_deadline, solicitation_number, source_url, stage, gda_label, notes, created_at, updated_at)
SELECT {{ $json.title }}, {{ $json.agency }}, {{ $json.agency }}, {{ $json.naics || '' }}, {{ $json.response_deadline || null }}::date, {{ $json.solicitation_number }}, {{ $json.link }}, 'Identified', 'EVALUATE', 'Auto-detected IDIQ task order via SAM.gov scan. Vehicle: ' || {{ $json.matched_vehicle }}, NOW(), NOW()
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE solicitation_number = {{ $json.solicitation_number }} AND {{ $json.solicitation_number }} <> '')
RETURNING id, title;

INSERT INTO gda_intelligence_log (category, finding, source, agency, created_at) VALUES ('task_order', {{ $json.title + ' | Vehicle: ' + $json.matched_vehicle + ' | Deadline: ' + ($json.response_deadline || 'TBD') }}, 'idiq-task-order-alert', {{ $json.agency }}, NOW())

parameters.jsCode: return [{json:{status:'ok', message:'No new task orders detected on monitored IDIQs today', checked_at: new Date().toISOString()}}];

return [{json:{status:'ok', message:'No active IDIQs configured for task order monitoring. Add vehicles via GDA.api.idiq-tracker with monitor_task_orders=true', checked_at: new Date().toISOString()}}];
